text: All walls should have the property FireRating in the set Pset_WallCommon with a value being one of REI30, REI60, REI90.

IFC versions: IFC4X3_ADD2 IFC4 IFC2X3

The model MUST contain entities that have
- IFC class IFCBUILDINGSTOREY

that MEET the following requirements
- MUST HAVE attribute Name matching the pattern 00 ground floor|01 first floor|02 second floor

Instructions
Add a list of names in the Requirements by use of regular expression
